layout_variants.display_zh: 1 客户风险评级（‘CRR’）。

units.source_text: Quality classification definitions
units.translation_target_text: 质量分类定义
units.translation_zh: 质量分类定义

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 质量分类定义

units.source_text: – ‘Strong’ exposures demonstrate a strong capacity to meet financial commitments, with negligible or low probability of default and/or low levels of
units.translation_target_text: –“强”风险暴露表明履行财务承诺的强大能力，违约概率可以忽略不计或很低，和/或违约率较低
units.translation_zh: –“强”风险暴露表明履行财务承诺的强大能力，违约概率可以忽略不计或很低，和/或违约率较低

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: –“强”风险暴露表明履行财务承诺的强大能力，违约概率可以忽略不计或很低，和/或违约率较低

units.source_text: expected loss.
units.translation_target_text: 预期损失。
units.translation_zh: 预期损失。

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 预期损失。

units.source_text: – ‘Good’ exposures require closer monitoring and demonstrate a good capacity to meet financial commitments, with low default risk.
units.translation_target_text: – “良好”的风险敞口需要更密切的监控，并展示出良好的履行财务承诺的能力，且违约风险较低。
units.translation_zh: – “良好”的风险敞口需要更密切的监控，并展示出良好的履行财务承诺的能力，且违约风险较低。

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: – “良好”的风险敞口需要更密切的监控，并展示出良好的履行财务承诺的能力，且违约风险较低。

units.source_text: – ‘Satisfactory’ exposures require closer monitoring and demonstrate an average-to-fair capacity to meet financial commitments, with moderate default risk.
units.translation_target_text: – “令人满意”的风险敞口需要更密切的监控，并展示出平均水平的履行财务承诺的能力，以及中等程度的违约风险。
units.translation_zh: – “令人满意”的风险敞口需要更密切的监控，并展示出平均水平的履行财务承诺的能力，以及中等程度的违约风险。

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: – “令人满意”的风险敞口需要更密切的监控，并展示出平均水平的履行财务承诺的能力，以及中等程度的违约风险。

units.source_text: – ‘Sub-standard’ exposures require varying degrees of special attention and default risk is of greater concern.
units.translation_target_text: – “不达标”风险暴露需要不同程度的特别关注，违约风险更值得关注。
units.translation_zh: – “不达标”风险暴露需要不同程度的特别关注，违约风险更值得关注。

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: – “不达标”风险暴露需要不同程度的特别关注，违约风险更值得关注。

units.source_text: – ‘Credit-impaired’ exposures have been assessed as described in Note 1.2(j) to the financial statements.
units.translation_target_text: – “信用减值”风险敞口已按照财务报表附注 1.2(j) 中所述进行评估。
units.translation_zh: – “信用减值”风险敞口已按照财务报表附注 1.2(j) 中所述进行评估。

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: – “信用减值”风险敞口已按照财务报表附注 1.2(j) 中所述进行评估。

units.source_text: Forborne loans and advances
units.translation_target_text: 暂缓贷款和垫款
units.translation_zh: 暂缓贷款和垫款

layout_variants.display_zh: 暂缓贷款和垫款

units.source_text: Forbearance measures consist of concessions towards an obligor that
units.translation_target_text: 宽容措施包括对债务人的让步，
units.translation_zh: 宽容措施包括对债务人的让步，

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 宽容措施包括对债务人的让步，

units.source_text: is experiencing, or about to experience, difficulties in meeting its
units.translation_target_text: 在实现其目标时正在经历或即将经历困难

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 在实现其目标时正在经历或即将经历困难

units.source_text: financial commitments.
units.translation_target_text: 财务承诺。
units.translation_zh: 财务承诺。

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 财务承诺。

units.source_text: We continue to class loans as forborne when we modify the
units.translation_target_text: 当我们修改贷款时，我们继续将贷款归类为禁止贷款
units.translation_zh: 当我们修改贷款时，我们继续将贷款归类为禁止贷款

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 当我们修改贷款时，我们继续将贷款归类为禁止贷款

units.source_text: contractual payment terms due to having concerns about the
units.translation_target_text: 由于担心合同付款条款
units.translation_zh: 由于担心合同付款条款

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 由于担心合同付款条款

units.source_text: borrowers’ ability to meet contractual payments when they were due.
units.translation_target_text: 借款人到期时履行合同付款的能力。
units.translation_zh: 借款人到期时履行合同付款的能力。

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 借款人到期时履行合同付款的能力。

units.source_text: Our definition of forborne captures non-payment-related concessions,
units.translation_target_text: 我们对放弃的定义涵盖了与付款无关的让步，
units.translation_zh: 我们对放弃的定义涵盖了与付款无关的让步，

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 我们对放弃的定义涵盖了与付款无关的让步，

units.source_text: such as covenant waivers.
units.translation_target_text: 例如豁免契约。
units.translation_zh: 例如豁免契约。

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: 例如豁免契约。

units.source_text: Ñ For details of our policy on forbearance, see Note 1.2(j) in the financial
units.translation_target_text: Ñ 有关宽容政策的详细信息，请参阅财务报表附注 1.2(j)
units.translation_zh: Ñ 有关宽容政策的详细信息，请参阅财务报表附注 1.2(j)

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_zh: Ñ 有关宽容政策的详细信息，请参阅财务报表附注 1.2(j)
